title: Add missing step in installing into Ubuntu

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

@cheesiong-lee thanks for signing, but now it looks like you've got two files that don't belong with this PR.  I think you need to rebase before pushing.  If you need help with that or would like me to spin up a PR to do this change, please let me know.

> git rebase -i origin
> git push --force

Sorry for the mistake and thanks for your command. 
Now, there is only 1 files changed.

Let me know if you need me close this PR and create another PR for the same codes?

No worries @cheesiong-lee , thanks so much for sticking with it.  You shouldn't need to do another PR at this point, this should be good to go.  However Travis is not happy at the moment, I don't think it has anything to do with your changes.
@rhatdan or @vrothberg the bot seems to be ignoring me and the tests were cancelled due to some other job running first?  Can one of you try kicking the bot please?

:pushpin: Commit 8f9fd6b has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 8f9fd6b01506ec8e87cd6e04014508788cd680c4 -->
